title: Image Analysis Software and R Codes for Astrobotany Root and Plant Phenotyping
description: A collection of image-analysis software, Jupyter/Colab notebooks, R scripts, example image datasets, and RSML root-architecture traces used in spaceflight-related astrobotany experiments (incl. ISS APEX-03 and ABRS). Includes workflows for RootNav, RootTrace, Germinator, PlantCV, and Cellpose, with an emphasis on measuring root system architecture and exporting data in the open RSML format. Code is MIT-licensed; data, images, and RSML are released under CC-BY-4.0 (see LICENSE and LICENSE-DATA.md).
notes: Bundled third-party tools (RootNav, RootTrace, Germinator) retain their own upstream licenses and are not redistributed in version control — see software/README.md. Spaceflight imagery (APEX-03, ABRS) is NASA-derived; see LICENSE-DATA.md for attribution.
